Dear Turbo
A Letter For You
Hi Turbo,
(maaf ya lebih lama dari deadline-nya 😅)

As our group name says, Turbo, or "Batur Brojol," you guys have been there since the first day I was born into this world. Not bound by blood, but somehow we just know we've always been there for each other, since day one.

From every Sunday we used to meet, to semesterly meetups, and now to rarely seeing each other in person, but I know you guys are still there, through our random group voice calls and everything else.

Before I get to the main topic, let me say this from the deepest part of my heart: thank you for still being here, watching me go through stage after stage in life. I thank God that you guys are still around me until now. You've witnessed my first boyfriend, my first heartbreak, and you were there since the very first day I started getting closer with Nanda.

Now, as life continues, I'm about to continue my own journey, from Brahmacari Asrama to Grehasta Asrama, and I would love, respectfully and wholeheartedly, to invite you to join and witness this next step: becoming one with the person I've chosen.

Nanda won't be replacing the part of my heart you guys hold. He'll be filling all the other parts of my life.

With love, Titha 🤍
Our Story

How it happened,
slowly and then all at once.

2017
Campus Life
We met through campus life, never expecting to grow close.
2018
The Beginning
We started talking, and somewhere between the conversations and all the little dramas along the way, we got closer.
2025
The Question
In front of Gubeng Station, no fancy dinner, no set up romantic scenery. Just Nanda, one ring, and a question that led to forever.
2026
Forever Begins
This September, we're saying our vows.
